body_transformation: The rounded head retains its pointed ears but now bears a jagged horn crest of obsidian black, while the light blue body shifts to deep sapphire with violet twilight undertones. The beige shell transforms into reinforced dorsal spines of scaled armor plating along the back, its brown accents replaced by golden amber veins. The curled tail tip elongates slightly and gains metallic sheen, matching the leathery wing membranes on the limbs. The short stubby legs now feature scaled armor plating with crimson flame detailing at the joints.
signature_feature: Dorsal spines: reinforced obsidian armor plating with golden amber veins and crimson flame accents.
